title: Emerald as villagers
description: This is a resource pack which makes the emeralds look like it has a villager's face.
body: As we all know, emeralds are the most important thing to villagers, so why not remember them, every time you look at an emerald. This, somewhat unsettling resource-pack makes the emerald look like they have a villager's face etched onto those shiny gems! Hope you like it ;D
